description: You can execute these commands from the CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.

outputs.description: Event logical ID VeloCloud.Event.category Event category
outputs.name: VeloCloud.Event.logicalId

outputs.description: Event message VeloCloud.Event.detail Event details, usually in JSON string format
outputs.name: VeloCloud.Event.message

outputs.description: Event creation time VeloCloud.Event.edgeName Name of the edge
outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: Name of the enterprise VeloCloud.Event.enterpriseUsername Username associated with the enterprise
outputs.name: VeloCloud.Event.enterpriseName
